mapper.sql: depID, depCode, depName, depAbbr, compID, adminID, depGrade, depType, depProperty, depCost, director, director2, depEmp, depNum, effectDate, xOrder, isDisabled, disabledDate, remark, depCustom1, depCustom2, depCustom3, depCustom4, depCustom5
mapper.insert:
SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()
insert into ehr_department (depCode, depName, depAbbr, compID, adminID, depGrade, depType, depProperty, depCost, director, director2, depEmp, depNum, effectDate, xOrder, isDisabled, disabledDate, remark, depCustom1, depCustom2, depCustom3, depCustom4, depCustom5) values (#{depCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{depName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{depAbbr,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{compID,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{adminID,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{depGrade,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{depType,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{depProperty,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{depCost,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{director,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{director2,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{depEmp,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{depNum,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{effectDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{xOrder,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{isDisabled,jdbcType=BIT}, #{disabledDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{depCustom1,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{depCustom2,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{depCustom3,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{depCustom4,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{depCustom5,jdbcType=INTEGER})

SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()
insert into ehr_department
depCode,
depName,
depAbbr,
compID,
adminID,
depGrade,
depType,
depProperty,
depCost,
director,
director2,
depEmp,
depNum,
effectDate,
xOrder,
isDisabled,
disabledDate,
remark,
depCustom1,
depCustom2,
depCustom3,
depCustom4,
depCustom5,

mapper.update:
update ehr_department
depCode = #{depCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
depName = #{depName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
depAbbr = #{depAbbr,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
compID = #{compID,jdbcType=INTEGER},
adminID = #{adminID,jdbcType=INTEGER},
depGrade = #{depGrade,jdbcType=INTEGER},
depType = #{depType,jdbcType=INTEGER},
depProperty = #{depProperty,jdbcType=INTEGER},
depCost = #{depCost,jdbcType=INTEGER},
director = #{director,jdbcType=INTEGER},
director2 = #{director2,jdbcType=INTEGER},
depEmp = #{depEmp,jdbcType=INTEGER},
depNum = #{depNum,jdbcType=INTEGER},
effectDate = #{effectDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
xOrder = #{xOrder,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
isDisabled = #{isDisabled,jdbcType=BIT},
disabledDate = #{disabledDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
remark = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
depCustom1 = #{depCustom1,jdbcType=INTEGER},
depCustom2 = #{depCustom2,jdbcType=INTEGER},
depCustom3 = #{depCustom3,jdbcType=INTEGER},
depCustom4 = #{depCustom4,jdbcType=INTEGER},
depCustom5 = #{depCustom5,jdbcType=INTEGER},
where depID = #{depID,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update ehr_department set depCode = #{depCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, depName = #{depName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, depAbbr = #{depAbbr,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, compID = #{compID,jdbcType=INTEGER}, adminID = #{adminID,jdbcType=INTEGER}, depGrade = #{depGrade,jdbcType=INTEGER}, depType = #{depType,jdbcType=INTEGER}, depProperty = #{depProperty,jdbcType=INTEGER}, depCost = #{depCost,jdbcType=INTEGER}, director = #{director,jdbcType=INTEGER}, director2 = #{director2,jdbcType=INTEGER}, depEmp = #{depEmp,jdbcType=INTEGER}, depNum = #{depNum,jdbcType=INTEGER}, effectDate = #{effectDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, xOrder = #{xOrder,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, isDisabled = #{isDisabled,jdbcType=BIT}, disabledDate = #{disabledDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, remark = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, depCustom1 = #{depCustom1,jdbcType=INTEGER}, depCustom2 = #{depCustom2,jdbcType=INTEGER}, depCustom3 = #{depCustom3,jdbcType=INTEGER}, depCustom4 = #{depCustom4,jdbcType=INTEGER}, depCustom5 = #{depCustom5,jdbcType=INTEGER} where depID = #{depID,jdbcType=INTEGER}
mapper.select:
select * from ehr_department
depID = #{depID, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
depCode = #{depCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
depName = #{depName, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND

depCustom5 = #{depCustom5, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND

effectDate = #{effectDate, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
xOrder = #{xOrder, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
isDisabled = #{isDisabled, jdbcType=BIT} AND
disabledDate = #{disabledDate, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
remark = #{remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND

select * from ehr_department
depID = #{model.depID, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
depCode = #{model.depCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
depName = #{model.depName, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
depAbbr = #{model.depAbbr, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
compID = #{model.compID, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
adminID = #{model.adminID, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
depGrade = #{model.depGrade, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
depType = #{model.depType, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
depProperty = #{model.depProperty, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
depCost = #{model.depCost, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
director = #{model.director, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
director2 = #{model.director2, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
depEmp = #{model.depEmp, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
depNum = #{model.depNum, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
effectDate = #{model.effectDate, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
xOrder = #{model.xOrder, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
isDisabled = #{model.isDisabled, jdbcType=BIT} AND
disabledDate = #{model.disabledDate, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
remark = #{model.remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
depCustom1 = #{model.depCustom1, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
depCustom2 = #{model.depCustom2, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
depCustom3 = #{model.depCustom3, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
depCustom4 = #{model.depCustom4, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
depCustom5 = #{model.depCustom5, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
( depCode like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or depName like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or depAbbr like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or xOrder like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or remark like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") )
order by ${orderBy}
limit #{start}, #{pageSize}

select count(1) from ehr_department
depID = #{model.depID, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
depCode = #{model.depCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
depName = #{model.depName, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
depAbbr = #{model.depAbbr, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
compID = #{model.compID, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
adminID = #{model.adminID, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
depGrade = #{model.depGrade, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
depType = #{model.depType, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
depProperty = #{model.depProperty, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
depCost = #{model.depCost, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
director = #{model.director, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
director2 = #{model.director2, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
depEmp = #{model.depEmp, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
depNum = #{model.depNum, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
effectDate = #{model.effectDate, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
xOrder = #{model.xOrder, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
isDisabled = #{model.isDisabled, jdbcType=BIT} AND
disabledDate = #{model.disabledDate, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
remark = #{model.remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
depCustom1 = #{model.depCustom1, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
depCustom2 = #{model.depCustom2, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
depCustom3 = #{model.depCustom3, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
depCustom4 = #{model.depCustom4, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
depCustom5 = #{model.depCustom5, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
( depCode like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or depName like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or depAbbr like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or xOrder like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or remark like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") )

select * from view_ehr_department
depID = #{model.depID, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
depCode = #{model.depCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
depName = #{model.depName, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
depAbbr = #{model.depAbbr, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
compID = #{model.compID, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
adminID = #{model.adminID, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
depGrade = #{model.depGrade, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
depType = #{model.depType, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
depProperty = #{model.depProperty, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
depCost = #{model.depCost, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
director = #{model.director, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
director2 = #{model.director2, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
depEmp = #{model.depEmp, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
depNum = #{model.depNum, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
effectDate = #{model.effectDate, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
xOrder = #{model.xOrder, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
isDisabled = #{model.isDisabled, jdbcType=BIT} AND
disabledDate = #{model.disabledDate, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
remark = #{model.remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
depCustom1 = #{model.depCustom1, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
depCustom2 = #{model.depCustom2, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
depCustom3 = #{model.depCustom3, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
depCustom4 = #{model.depCustom4, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
depCustom5 = #{model.depCustom5, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
directorWorkNo = #{model.directorWorkNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
directorWorkNo2 = #{model.directorWorkNo2, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
directorName = #{model.directorName, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
directorName = #{model.directorName, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
depLV1Name = #{model.depLV1Name, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
depLV2Name = #{model.depLV2Name, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
depLV3Name = #{model.depLV3Name, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
depAllName = #{model.depAllName, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
depLV1ID = #{model.depLV1ID, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
depLV2ID = #{model.depLV2ID, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
depLV3ID = #{model.depLV3ID, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
compName = #{model.compName, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
find_in_set(depID, #{model.depIDs}) AND
!find_in_set(depID, #{model.depIDsExclude})
( depCode like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or depName like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or depAbbr like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or xOrder like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or remark like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or depAllName like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or compName like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or directorWorkNo like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or directorWorkNo2 like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or directorName like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or directorName2 like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") )
order by ${orderBy}
limit #{start}, #{pageSize}

select count(1) from view_ehr_department
depID = #{model.depID, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
depCode = #{model.depCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
depName = #{model.depName, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
depAbbr = #{model.depAbbr, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
compID = #{model.compID, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
adminID = #{model.adminID, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
depGrade = #{model.depGrade, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
depType = #{model.depType, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
depProperty = #{model.depProperty, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
depCost = #{model.depCost, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
director = #{model.director, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
director2 = #{model.director2, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
depEmp = #{model.depEmp, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
depNum = #{model.depNum, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
effectDate = #{model.effectDate, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
xOrder = #{model.xOrder, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
isDisabled = #{model.isDisabled, jdbcType=BIT} AND
disabledDate = #{model.disabledDate, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
remark = #{model.remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
depCustom1 = #{model.depCustom1, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
depCustom2 = #{model.depCustom2, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND

directorWorkNo = #{model.directorWorkNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
directorWorkNo2 = #{model.directorWorkNo2, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
directorName = #{model.directorName, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
directorName = #{model.directorName, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
depLV1Name = #{model.depLV1Name, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
depLV2Name = #{model.depLV2Name, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
depLV3Name = #{model.depLV3Name, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
depAllName = #{model.depAllName, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
depLV1ID = #{model.depLV1ID, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
depLV2ID = #{model.depLV2ID, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
depLV3ID = #{model.depLV3ID, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
compName = #{model.compName, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
find_in_set(depID, #{model.depIDs}) AND
!find_in_set(depID, #{model.depIDsExclude})
( depCode like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or depName like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or depAbbr like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or xOrder like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or remark like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or depAllName like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or compName like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or directorWorkNo like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or directorWorkNo2 like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or directorName like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or directorName2 like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") )

select * from view_ehr_department
depID = #{depID, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
depCode = #{depCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
depName = #{depName, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
depAbbr = #{depAbbr, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND

compName = #{compName, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
find_in_set(depID, #{depIDs}) AND
!find_in_set(depID, #{depIDsExclude})

select count(1) from view_ehr_department
depID = #{depID, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
depCode = #{depCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
depName = #{depName, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
depAbbr = #{depAbbr, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
compID = #{compID, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
adminID = #{adminID, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
depGrade = #{depGrade, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
depType = #{depType, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
depProperty = #{depProperty, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
depCost = #{depCost, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
director = #{director, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
director2 = #{director2, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
depEmp = #{depEmp, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
depNum = #{depNum, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
effectDate = #{effectDate, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
xOrder = #{xOrder, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
isDisabled = #{isDisabled, jdbcType=BIT} AND
disabledDate = #{disabledDate, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
remark = #{remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
depCustom1 = #{depCustom1, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
depCustom2 = #{depCustom2, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
depCustom3 = #{depCustom3, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
depCustom4 = #{depCustom4, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
depCustom5 = #{depCustom5, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
directorWorkNo = #{directorWorkNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
directorWorkNo2 = #{directorWorkNo2, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
directorName = #{directorName, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
directorName = #{directorName, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
depLV1Name = #{depLV1Name, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
depLV2Name = #{depLV2Name, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
depLV3Name = #{depLV3Name, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
depAllName = #{depAllName, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
depLV1ID = #{depLV1ID, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
depLV2ID = #{depLV2ID, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
depLV3ID = #{depLV3ID, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
compName = #{compName, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
find_in_set(depID, #{depIDs}) AND
!find_in_set(depID, #{depIDsExclude})

SELECT dep.`depID`, dep.`depName`, dep.`adminID`, dep1.`depID` AS subDepId, dep1.`depName` AS subDepName, dep1.`adminID` AS subAdminID FROM `view_ehr_department` `dep` LEFT JOIN `view_ehr_department` `dep1` ON `dep1`.`adminID` = `dep`.`depID`
dep.depID = #{depID, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
dep.depCode = #{depCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
dep.depName = #{depName, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
dep.depAbbr = #{depAbbr, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
dep.compID = #{compID, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
dep.adminID = #{adminID, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
dep.depGrade = #{depGrade, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
dep.depType = #{depType, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
dep.depProperty = #{depProperty, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
dep.depCost = #{depCost, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
dep.director = #{director, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
dep.director2 = #{director2, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
dep.depEmp = #{depEmp, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
dep.depNum = #{depNum, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
dep.effectDate = #{effectDate, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
dep.xOrder = #{xOrder, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
dep.isDisabled = #{isDisabled, jdbcType=BIT} AND
dep.disabledDate = #{disabledDate, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
dep.remark = #{remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
dep.depCustom1 = #{depCustom1, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
dep.depCustom2 = #{depCustom2, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
dep.depCustom3 = #{depCustom3, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
dep.depCustom4 = #{depCustom4, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
dep.depCustom5 = #{depCustom5, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
dep.depLV1Name = #{depLV1Name, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
dep.depLV2Name = #{depLV2Name, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
dep.depLV3Name = #{depLV3Name, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
dep.depAllName = #{depAllName, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
dep.depLV1ID = #{depLV1ID, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
dep.depLV2ID = #{depLV2ID, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
dep.depLV3ID = #{depLV3ID, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
dep.compName = #{compName, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
find_in_set(dep.depID, #{depIDs}) AND
!find_in_set(dep.depID, #{depIDsExclude})
